channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: GTA 6 Gameplay Details Unveiled
item.description: Rockstar reveals new gameplay features for GTA 6, including fishing and car restoration. Preorders for the Ultimate Edition are set to begin soon.

item.title: GTA VI Price Set at $80
item.description: Grand Theft Auto VI will launch at $80, making it pricier than typical AAA titles. This pricing strategy may set a new standard in the gaming industry.

item.title: Prime Day 2026 Tech Deals Highlighted
item.description: Amazon Prime Day runs from June 23-26, featuring select discounts on tech products. Notable deals include laptops and gadgets worth checking out.

item.title: Microsoft's Quantum Chip Claims Under Scrutiny
item.description: Microsoft's Majorana chip research faces skepticism from experts, challenging the company's claims. The tech giant remains committed to its quantum computing goals.

item.title: Foldable iPhone 'Ultra' Production Set
item.description: Apple's foldable iPhone 'Ultra' is slated for mass production starting July, despite reported hinge issues. Anticipation builds for this innovative device.

item.title: Nothing Launches Mini Phone Inspired by Apple
item.description: Nothing is producing a mini phone reminiscent of Apple's abandoned iPhone Mini. Priced under $320, it aims to capture the compact smartphone market.
